user.title: Add 1Control SoloMini
user.description:
Optionally paste the contents of a mitmproxy log to auto-fill security data. If you don't have a log, leave the field empty and enter the data manually in the next step.

**How to get a mitmproxy log:**
1. Set up mitmproxy as a proxy on your phone
2. Open the 1Control app and trigger a gate open
3. Export the log and paste its contents here

data_description.mitm_log: Paste the full mitmproxy log. The integration will automatically extract LTK, sessionKey and sessionID.

device.title: Device security data
device.description: Enter the BLE address and security keys for your SoloMini.

error.invalid_hex: Invalid hex format or wrong length.
error.parse_failed: Could not extract data from log. Make sure the log contains a security API call.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check the BLE address.
